articles.title: A Nitric Oxide-Releasing Zwitterionic Glycocalyx-Mimetic Hydrogel Armored Bioprosthetic Valve with Integrated Antithrombotic, Endothelialization-Promoting, and Immunomodulatory Capacities.
articles.authors: Zheng C, Wei B, Huang X, Chen L, Wang Y
articles.key_finding: STATEMENT OF SIGNIFICANCE: This work developed a nitric oxide-releasing zwitterionic glycocalyx-mimetic hydrogel-coated BHV to overcome key limitations such as thrombosis, poor endothelialization, inflammation, and calcification-issues associated with the cytotoxic xenogeneic collagenous matrix of BHVs.

articles.title: Reply to Letter regarding the article 'Prevalence and influence of cardiovascular kidney metabolic syndrome on outcomes after transcatheter aortic valve implantation'.

articles.title: Acute Pulmonary Congestion Secondary to Left Ventricular Outflow Tract Obstruction Following Transcatheter Aortic Valve Implantation in Severe Left Ventricular Hypertrophy: A Case Report.
articles.authors: Yoshiga M, Terada Y, Shimokawa A, Maeda T
articles.key_finding: Transcatheter aortic valve implantation (TAVI) may be associated with dynamic hemodynamic complications in patients with marked left ventricular hypertrophy.

articles.title: Prevalence, Pathophysiologic Mechanisms, and Clinical Outcomes of Tricuspid Regurgitation in the Elderly: Results from the TREY Registry.
articles.authors: Abdelghani M, Abdelshafy M, Muharram M, Elbadawi M, Mohey S et al.
articles.key_finding: Even mild TR (as compared with none/trace TR) was associated with TV and right-heart chamber remodeling (including higher tricuspid annulus [TA] diameter, p=0.002; TV leaflet length, p<0.001; right ventricular basal diameter, p=0.001; and right atrial area, p=0.003).

articles.title: Applying the 2025 ESC/EACTS Recommendations for the Treatment of Severe Tricuspid Regurgitation to Real-World Practice.
articles.authors: Stolz L, Kresoja KP, von Stein J, Fortmeier V, Pauschinger C et al.
articles.key_finding: OBJECTIVES: The aim of this study was to evaluate clinical and symptomatic outcomes in such "OMT candidate" patients.

articles.title: Mitral Edge-to-Edge Repair Resolves Hemolytic Anemia After Surgical Mitral Valve Repair.
articles.authors: Scheffler J, Schoensteiner S, Hanrieder A, Mörike J, Rottbauer W et al.
articles.key_finding: The patient underwent transcatheter mitral edge-to-edge repair (M-TEER), achieving reduction of MR to mild and resolution of hemolysis.

articles.title: Recurrent Ventricular Tachycardia in a Young Adult-Imaging and Genetic Evidence of
articles.authors: Gomez LE, Martinenghi N, Ortiz-Genga M, Tejeira MS, Buonfiglio P et al.
articles.key_finding: Pathogenic variants in the desmoplakin (DSP) gene have been increasingly associated with left-dominant or biventricular forms of ACM and inflammatory "hot phases" of myocardial injury.

articles.title: Gender Matters: A State-of-the-Art Review of Transcatheter Structural Interventions in Older Women Vs Men.
articles.authors: Liu J, Lyubarova R, Riggs J, Chung J, Mehta PK et al.
articles.key_finding: Optimal outcomes require careful consideration of sex-specific differences.

articles.title: Stereotactic Arrhythmia Radioablation: An Emerging Technique for the Treatment of Ventricular Tachycardia.
articles.authors: Comuzzi A, Candelora A, Madaffari A, Angheben C, Maines M et al.
articles.key_finding: Ventricular tachycardia (VT) in patients with structural heart disease is a significant cause of both morbidity and mortality.

articles.title: Lactation Safety in Peripartum Cardiomyopathy.
articles.authors: Khalid H, Kim A, Lau T, Parikh MA, Ramasubbu K et al.
articles.key_finding: This review summarizes the experimental and clinical evidence related to elevated PRL levels, particularly the cleaved 16-kDa PRL fragment's contribution to disease development, with emphasis on lactation safety in PPCM.
